message:
fix(core): fix compilation error in safe_channel and GC logic bug in rate_limit_tracker

- safe_channel.rs: fix is_drained() — `state.reservations.is_empty()` referenced
  non-existent field; corrected to `state.active_reservations == 0`
- rate_limit_tracker.rs: fix gc_at() — required events.is_empty() condition was
  unfulfillable (events are never cleared), so GC could never remove expired panes.
  Removed the condition so expired cooldowns are properly garbage collected.
  Updated test to verify both during-cooldown retention and post-cooldown removal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
